mapper.sql: article_id, article_label_id, article_author, article_title, article_summary, article_type_id, article_content, article_content_html, article_image, user_id, article_good_num, article_view_num, article_community_id, create_time, recommend, enable, is_delete
mapper.select:
select substr(s.org_no,1,${orgLength}) orgNo, s.org_name orgName, count(1) articleNumber from bbs_article t join bbs_user u on t.user_id = u.id join bbs_sa_org s on u.org_no = s.org_no where t.is_delete = 0 and t.enable = 1
and s.org_no like concat(#{orgNo},'%')
and t.create_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startTime}, '%Y-%m-%d') >= to_date(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND t.create_time < STR_TO_DATE(#{endTime}, '%Y-%m-%d') + INTERVAL 1 DAY to_date(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + interval '1 day'
group by substr(s.org_no,1,${orgLength}),s.org_name

SELECT t.orgNo, t.orgName, t.posts, t.replies, t.points, rank() OVER (ORDER BY t.points DESC, t.orgNo) AS rankNum FROM ( SELECT t1.org_no AS orgNo, t1.org_name AS orgName, coalesce(t2.posts, 0) AS posts, coalesce(t3.replies, 0) AS replies, (coalesce(t2.posts, 0) * #{post} + coalesce(t3.replies, 0) * #{reply}) AS points FROM ( SELECT s.org_no, s.org_name FROM bbs_sa_org s WHERE s.is_delete = 0 AND s.org_no LIKE concat(#{orgNo}, '%') AND length(s.org_no) <= ${orgLength} ) t1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT substr(u.org_no, 1, ${orgLength}) AS org_no, count(1) AS posts FROM bbs_article t JOIN bbs_user u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.is_delete = 0 AND t.enable = 1 AND u.org_no LIKE concat(#{orgNo}, '%') AND t.create_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startTime}, '%Y-%m-%d') >= to_date(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND t.create_time < STR_TO_DATE(#{endTime}, '%Y-%m-%d') + INTERVAL 1 DAY to_date(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + interval '1 day'
GROUP BY substr(u.org_no, 1, ${orgLength}) ) t2 ON t1.org_no = t2.org_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT substr(u.org_no, 1, ${orgLength}) AS org_no, count(1) AS replies FROM bbs_comment t JOIN bbs_user u ON t.comment_user_id = u.id WHERE t.is_delete = 0 AND t.enable = 1 AND u.org_no LIKE concat(#{orgNo}, '%') AND t.comment_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startTime}, '%Y-%m-%d') >= to_date(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND t.comment_time < STR_TO_DATE(#{endTime}, '%Y-%m-%d') + INTERVAL 1 DAY to_date(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + interval '1 day'
GROUP BY substr(u.org_no, 1, ${orgLength}) ) t3 ON t1.org_no = t3.org_no ) t ORDER BY t.points DESC, t.orgNo
